company.name: Rocking (PTY) LTD
company.registeredOffice: Unit A3, Westlake Square, Westlake Drive, Westlake, 7945, South Africa

doc.projectIntro: This quote covers a diagnostic assessment of Donovan's Dell Latitude 7480 laptop. Our technicians will inspect and test the unit and provide a report on the fault(s) found and the recommended repair. Any repairs identified will be quoted separately for your approval. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.detail: Full hardware and software diagnostic of the unit (assigned user: Donovan), with a written fault report and recommended repair. Diagnosis and reporting only — parts and repair labour are not included.

doc.summaryNote: Assessment and fault report only. The assessment fee is payable whether or not the unit is subsequently repaired. Any repair will be quoted separately for your approval before work proceeds.
terms: This quote is valid for 14 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
This is a diagnostic assessment fee and is payable whether or not the unit is subsequently repaired.
The assessment covers diagnosis and reporting only; parts and labour for any repair are not included.
Any repairs identified will be quoted separately for your approval before work proceeds.
Payment is due on completion of the assessment.

banking.branch: Blue Route Mall, Tokai Road, Tokai, 7945
banking.reference: Please use quote number as payment reference.

internal.note: Assessment cost R500 ex VAT; charge R600 ex VAT (explicit price per Shawn). Solutions Technology — Donovan's Dell Latitude 7480. Links to RFQ 439e2212 (requested by Timbo).
